/usr/bin/g++ -m32 -s 		-Wl,-gc-sections -Wl,--version-script="/mnt/REBORN/half_life_stuff/ReUnion/reunion/../version_script.lds" -shared -Wl,-soname,reunion_mm_i386.so -o reunion_mm_i386.so CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/client_auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/dllapi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/h_export.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/meta_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/murmur3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/public_amalgamation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/query_banlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/query_bugfix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/query_limiter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_authorizers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_cfg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_rehlds_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/reunion_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/Rijndael.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/RijndaelChanged.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/sdk_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/server_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/sha2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/Sizebuf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/reunion.dir/src/stdc++compat.cpp.o  -ldl
